subtasks.description: Query MongoDB to fetch all active billing contracts with contract ID, vendor, contract start/end dates, and contracted annual value (CAV). Filter for contracts with active status.
Query SQL warehouse to retrieve all invoices issued in 2024, grouped by contract ID, with total invoice amount per contract. Include contract identifier for matching.

Reconcile contracted annual values (from MongoDB) against actual 2024 invoice totals (from SQL). Calculate variance percentage for each contract. Flag contracts with material variance exceeding 10% threshold. Classify variance direction (over/under) and generate variance analysis with flagged contract list.

plan.cost_rationale: Three-subtask plan required: (1) MongoDB query of active contracts (small: straightforward filter and field selection), (2) SQL aggregation of 2024 invoices by contract (small: single-table aggregation with date filter), (3) Cross-reconciliation of two sources with variance calculation and flagging logic (mid: requires matching contract IDs across sources, calculating percentages, applying threshold logic, and generating classification/analysis output). The cross_recon tier is mid because it combines two source results, performs mathematical operations, applies conditional flagging, and produces an actionable recommendation set—beyond simple lookup capability. No policy_action needed because variance flagging is analytical classification, not governance policy evaluation.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_invoice_amount_2024, COUNT(*) AS invoice_count FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY contract_id ORDER BY contract_id
